title: Vulnlog Project
description: Project-level metadata. Used in report generation and as author information in VEX documents.

organization.description: Name of the organization or vendor.

author.description: Name of the responsible security team or author. Used as the author in VEX documents.

contact.description: Contact email for the security team. Used as the author contact in VEX documents. Can be the contact from your security.txt.
